prompt: I already have @peril-ai/react installed and working, but I need to configure the MCP server so Cursor can see the reviews. Can you set that up?

assertions.text: MCP config contains a 'peril' server entry with npx @peril-ai/mcp
assertions.check: .cursor/mcp.json has mcpServers.peril with command npx and args including @peril-ai/mcp

assertions.text: Does NOT modify App.tsx since it's already configured
assertions.check: App.tsx should be identical to its original content

assertions.text: Does NOT run npm install since packages are already installed
assertions.check: Summary should not include an npm/pnpm/yarn install command
